titleStmt.title: SII 22.86: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 86. (A.R. No. 86 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—26th YEAR (A.D. 1010-11)

summary.p: The introduction is Tirumagaḷ pōla etc. The inscription is left incomplete. It mentions an order of Maṟavaṉ Narasiṁhapanmaṉ alias Rājarāja-Vāṇakōvaraiyar to his subordinates to find out a land in the brahmadēya Koṭṭagam on the northern bank in his nāḍu (i.e., under his jurisdiction) which would suffice to yield paddy at a kuṟuṇi and 4 nāḻi per day as required for offerings to the god during the three services in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷvār. A panegyric of this chief is given in Sanskrit after the regnal year of the king, calling him an “ornament of Mahābali-kula and “Parivipuraparamēśvara”.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyu n=taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu n=taṭikaipāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭuṅkollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara yiḻamaṇ
ṭalamu miraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamu n=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻi yellāvāṇṭu n=toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrīkorājarāja rājakesaripanmarāna śrīrājarājatevaṟ kiyāṇṭu 2 10 6Āvatu . svasti
sakala surāsura samadhikṛta vijaiya śrīmanohāri vallabhamahārāja mahābali kulatilakāyamāna puṇyai śarirudaiya nandananda śrī nātha paṟivai puraparameśvara veścicinnālaṅghṛtavṛṣabhalāñjanaḥ . śrīmat maṟavannarasiṅhapanmaṉāṉa rājarājavāṇakovaraiyar ta
ṅ kanmikaḷai yaḻaiccu nammuṭaiya mahaādevar tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Āḷvārkku tiruvamutu potu nāṉāḻiyariciyāka trisan=ti muṉṟukkum kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyaricikku nammuṭaiya nāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakarai brahmateyam koṭṭakamāṉa vataṉai niṅkaḷ poy pārttu varukaveṉṟaruḷucceyya Iva
rkaḷ poy nir pūci nelviḷaiyunilam pārttu kāviri teṉkarai kāṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ kāriyaraṅkaṉ viṇṇappattālu miruṅkoḷappāṭi tevaṉkuṭi teṉṟi tiruviḷaṅkoyi larikulattiṉ viṇṇappattālum Ivvūr civabrāhmaṇan kaucikan Ātittan pūṟvamuṭaiyāṉāṉa rājarāStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
